coat_colors: white (small dark patch near eye allowed)

description.overview: The Dogo Argentino was bred in Argentina for big-game hunting, including wild boar and puma.
description.temperament: Dogos are loyal, courageous, and protective. They're friendly with family but need early socialization.
description.health: Prone to deafness (especially pigment-related) and hip dysplasia.
description.exercise: High energy. Need vigorous daily exercise and mental stimulation.

verdict.summary: Powerful Argentine hunting dogs with loyal hearts. Dogos are athletic and protective but need experienced owners and proper socialization.
